description: Episode-level failure classification across 6 failure types. Fixed test set of 360 episodes from 5 robot platforms. Submit predictions to aarav@haptal.ai to be added.

metric_definitions.macro_f1: Unweighted mean F1 across all 6 failure classes
metric_definitions.cohen_kappa: Inter-rater agreement vs ground truth (κ=1.0 is perfect, κ=0.0 is chance)
metric_definitions.ood_macro_f1: Macro F1 on held-out robot platform not seen during training
metric_definitions.generalisation_gap: In-distribution macro F1 minus OOD macro F1 (lower is better)

human_reference.note: Human operators provide binary pass/fail only. Haptal provides 6-class failure type with timestep precision.

entries.notes: 68-dim step features (mean+std+max) → 204-dim episode vector. Multi-dataset training. Hard negatives in nominal class.
Human operator pass/fail labels as ground truth. Binary only — no failure type or timestep. 160 episodes.
Always predicts the majority class. No learning.
